channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: New Music Friday | July 24 Record Club is excited to showca…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
New Music Friday | July 24

Record Club is excited to showcase new music from The Strokes, Charli xcx, and more. Which release did you decide to check out first tonight? Were there any we missed? Let us know in the comments! For a more comprehensive list of releases head to record.club!
item.content:encoded:
New Music Friday | July 24

Record Club is excited to showcase new music from The Strokes, Charli xcx, and more. Which release did you decide to check out first tonight? Were there any we missed? Let us know in the comments! For a more comprehensive list of releases head to record.club!

item.title: The Justice Department is dropping the subpoenas it filed de…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Justice Department is dropping the subpoenas it filed demanding grand jury testimony and phone records from New York Times journalists after sharp questioning Thursday from a federal judge. n.pr/4b5pIh8
item.content:encoded: The Justice Department is dropping the subpoenas it filed demanding grand jury testimony and phone records from New York Times journalists after sharp questioning Thursday from a federal judge. n.pr/4b5pIh8

item.title: Tonight Appalachian roots rocker John R. Miller returned to …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Tonight Appalachian roots rocker John R. Miller returned to the Grand Ole Opry and introduced a “monumentally influential practitioner of the guitar” as his surprise guest. J Mascis then joined Miller onstage to perform “Steering Wheel Drums,” marking the @dinosaurjr.com frontman’s own Opry debut.
item.content:encoded: Tonight Appalachian roots rocker John R. Miller returned to the Grand Ole Opry and introduced a “monumentally influential practitioner of the guitar” as his surprise guest. J Mascis then joined Miller onstage to perform “Steering Wheel Drums,” marking the @dinosaurjr.com frontman’s own Opry debut.

item.title: Fiona Apple's debut album 'Tidal' was released 30 years ago …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Fiona Apple's debut album 'Tidal' was released 30 years ago today. 💿 What's your favorite track?
item.content:encoded: Fiona Apple's debut album 'Tidal' was released 30 years ago today. 💿 What's your favorite track?

item.title: The United States will slap taxes of 10% to 12.5% on imports…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The United States will slap taxes of 10% to 12.5% on imports from 60 countries accounting for 99% of U.S. imports, charging that they have inadequately enforced bans on goods produced by forced labor. n.pr/4gUHhnO
item.content:encoded: The United States will slap taxes of 10% to 12.5% on imports from 60 countries accounting for 99% of U.S. imports, charging that they have inadequately enforced bans on goods produced by forced labor. n.pr/4gUHhnO

item.title: English teachers are excited to have a new adaptation of Hom…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: English teachers are excited to have a new adaptation of Homer's The Odyssey to use to get students excited about the epic poem. n.pr/4yJOopB
item.content:encoded: English teachers are excited to have a new adaptation of Homer's The Odyssey to use to get students excited about the epic poem. n.pr/4yJOopB

item.title: Irish news
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Irish news
item.content:encoded: Irish news

item.title: A council packed with Trump appointees is poised to rewrite …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A council packed with Trump appointees is poised to rewrite historic preservation rules. Critics say that could help him build his D.C. arch faster — and endanger important sites across the country. n.pr/3TAkW53
item.content:encoded: A council packed with Trump appointees is poised to rewrite historic preservation rules. Critics say that could help him build his D.C. arch faster — and endanger important sites across the country. n.pr/3TAkW53

item.content:encoded: A council packed with Trump appointees is poised to rewrite historic preservation rules. Critics say that could help him build his D.C. arch faster — and endanger important sites across the country.

item.title: Update: Advisers to the Food and Drug Administration voted …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Update:

Advisers to the Food and Drug Administration voted in favor of easing regulation of popular peptides. The recommendations could pave the way for specialized pharmacies to produce them in the U.S.
item.content:encoded:
Update:

Advisers to the Food and Drug Administration voted in favor of easing regulation of popular peptides. The recommendations could pave the way for specialized pharmacies to produce them in the U.S.

item.content:encoded: New & Notable: Emo folk anchored by angular drums, electric guitar twang, and melodic, baroque basslines.

item.title: R&B star Syd explores the complexities of romantic relations…

item.content:encoded: R&B star Syd explores the complexities of romantic relationships and self-acceptance in her third solo album, Beard. n.pr/3TbO02R

item.title: Kevin Morby reports that the family has been listening to Gr…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Kevin Morby reports that the family has been listening to Grouper's "Heavy Water/I’d Rather Be Sleeping" on repeat and that Katie Crutchfield is "such a badass, but yall already knew that."

He'll have to skip Eaux Claires tomorrow, and the festival announced that he’ll be replaced by “Bon.”
item.content:encoded:
Kevin Morby reports that the family has been listening to Grouper's "Heavy Water/I’d Rather Be Sleeping" on repeat and that Katie Crutchfield is "such a badass, but yall already knew that."

He'll have to skip Eaux Claires tomorrow, and the festival announced that he’ll be replaced by “Bon.”

item.title: Adéla announced her debut album 'Prima' — hear "Ain't In LA"
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)

item.content:encoded: Adéla announced her debut album 'Prima' — hear "Ain't In LA"

item.title: We've got a trio of artists who were, or are, central to oth…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: We've got a trio of artists who were, or are, central to other bands. Host Robin Hilton presents them as solo acts. Look for Tiny Desk Radio on your local NPR station. n.pr/4fjemsl

item.title: Four Republicans joined Democrats to approve the measure. An…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Four Republicans joined Democrats to approve the measure. And while it is not legally binding, the resolution represents growing frustration inside Congress over the war.
item.content:encoded: Four Republicans joined Democrats to approve the measure. And while it is not legally binding, the resolution represents growing frustration inside Congress over the war.

item.title: Nashville-based Logan Hornyak, who makes tangled glitch-folk…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Nashville-based Logan Hornyak, who makes tangled glitch-folk music as Melaina Kol, is releasing his first album for Philly label Julia's War in a few weeks. Its latest single "Idola” is another captivating web of sound, both delicate and strange.
item.content:encoded: Nashville-based Logan Hornyak, who makes tangled glitch-folk music as Melaina Kol, is releasing his first album for Philly label Julia's War in a few weeks. Its latest single "Idola” is another captivating web of sound, both delicate and strange.
